source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder has ammonia at 2000 kPa, 80\circ\text{C} with a volume of 0.1 m3. The piston is loaded with a linear spring and outside ambient is at 20\circ\text{C}. The ammonia now cools down to 20\circ\text{C}, at which point it has a quality of 15%. Find the entropy generation for the process.
